key_points: A power represents repeated multiplication of a number
Exponent tells how many times a number is multiplied by itself
Square of a number means multiplying the number by itself
Cube of a number means multiplying the number three times
Square roots and cube roots are the inverse operations of squares and cubes
exam_tips: Remember common square numbers up to 20
Learn cube numbers of small integers
Check the exponent carefully before solving
Square root and cube root questions are common in exams
